title: scirpus californicus var. tereticulmis
intro: Scirpus californicus var. tereticulmis, also known as California bulrush, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the sedge family, primarily found in the southwestern United States. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for treating colds, fever, and respiratory issues, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of California bulrush include reducing inflammation, relieving congestion, and aiding in the treatment of bronchitis and other respiratory infections. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea by infusing the roots and rhizomes in hot water, or it can be used in a salve or ointment to soothe skin irritations and wounds.
